scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @chessforge/engine build && pnpm --filter @chessforge/ai build && pnpm --filter @chessforge/client dev
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @chessforge/engine build && pnpm --filter @chessforge/ai build && pnpm --filter @chessforge/client build
scripts.build:pages: pnpm --filter @chessforge/engine build && pnpm --filter @chessforge/ai build && VITE_BASE=/${npm_package_name}/ pnpm --filter @chessforge/client build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @chessforge/engine build && pnpm --filter @chessforge/ai build && pnpm --filter @chessforge/client typecheck
